description_long: This object is a compact, black, tactical device with a robust, armored exterior and a streamlined, cylindrical rear section. The left side features the label 'AATON' and '16 AII', suggesting a specialized model, and there are two parallel metallic rods extending from the front, possibly for mounting or stabilization. The device has a prominent brown ergonomic grip and a secondary black handle, both designed for manual operation. The top section includes a sighting or targeting apparatus, and the overall build is dense and reinforced, with visible mechanical components and adjustment knobs. The surface is mostly matte black with some metallic and wooden elements, giving it a utilitarian, military-grade appearance.
description: A compact, armored black tactical device with metallic rods, ergonomic grips, and a sighting apparatus, marked 'AATON 16 AII'. Its robust build and reinforced exterior suggest military or specialized use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'AATON 16 AII' label, brown grip, black handle, and two metallic rods extending forward.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular front face, the alignment of the rods, and the brown grip's profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the 'AATON' label visible, showing the full length of the cylindrical rear and the metallic rods.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the two parallel rods, the brown grip, and the compact, armored rear section.
attribute_armor_plating: No visible armor plating; exterior appears to be a single, robust shell with no distinct armored panels.
attribute_military_markings: White 'AATON 16 AII' label on the left side of the device.
